candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label from candidate list; identical to Net sales in preview and suitable as a fallback/alternate label across years.
Direct sales/revenue line and appears to be the primary reported top-line; identical to Total Revenue in preview.
Not revenue; cost line.
Not revenue; cost line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Not revenue; cost component.
Not revenue; cost component.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; both are exact top-line labels and identical in the preview.

candidates.why: Best direct COGS label; equals the total direct production/service cost line.
Only a component, not full COGS.
Seems to exclude D&A in some years and is not the full total when compared with Cost of goods sold / Cost of Revenues - Total.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Only a D&A component; should be excluded from standalone COGS mapping.
Also a plausible full COGS label and matches Cost of goods sold in preview, but Cost of goods sold is the cleaner direct label.

variables.notes: Selected the most direct full COGS label.

candidates.why: Overhead category but appears to include D&A, since it exceeds Selling Expenses by the D&A amount.
Selling overhead component excluding the separate D&A row; preferred over the total-like Selling expenses row.
Possible SG&A component label, but no visible values in preview and less comprehensive than explicit selling/admin rows.
Balance sheet accrual, not income-statement SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: D&A should be excluded from XSGA components.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the key overhead row 'Administrative Costs' visible in the Income Statement. Chose component rows that appear to exclude separate D&A ('Selling Expenses' and 'Administrative Costs') instead of total-like rows ('Selling expenses' and 'Administrative costs') that appear to include D&A. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Administrative Costs

candidates.why: Offset/grant related to R&D, not the R&D expense itself.
R&D total that appears to include D&A; less preferred than the explicit expense row excluding separate D&A.
Only a component of R&D and not available across years in preview.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: D&A component; should not be selected as the main R&D expense line.
Best direct R&D expense label and appears to exclude separately listed D&A.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization item, not the main current-period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Using a priority list to handle possible label variation; prefer the explicit expense row over the broader total-cost row.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost aggregate; usable only if a more specific interest expense line is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best specific interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component, not the main all-in interest expense line.
Not specifically interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate/component, not preferred main interest line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer the specific interest expense line; use broader financial expenses only as fallback if needed in some years.

candidates.why: Valid equity line but includes non-controlling interests, which would double count if MIB is also mapped separately.
Balancing row, not a reported equity measure.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the preferable owner/parent equity line. Selected 'Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders' to exclude non-controlling interests and avoid double counting with MIB. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not the balance-sheet minority interest stock.
Best balance-sheet NCI/minority interest label.
Also a valid balance-sheet minority interest label; appears duplicate of Non-controlling interests.
Income statement attribution line, not the balance-sheet minority interest stock.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet NCI labels as a priority list; both appear to be synonymous and identical in preview.
